rationale: Educ. Code §11.351 governs establishment of special-purpose school districts and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.351. AUTHORITY TO ESTABLISH SPECIAL-PURPOSE SCHOOL DISTRICT.
_note: Rule text concerns special-purpose school district authority; no bearing on homestead exemption appraisal values.
